prompt: A full-body fashion portrait of a stylish older woman standing confidently on a covered outdoor patio, centered in the frame, hands on hips, looking straight at the camera. She has short, softly curled white hair in a voluminous pixie-bob style, with a mature elegant presence. She wears a fitted long-sleeve cropped turtleneck in rust brown, high-waisted light blue wide-leg distressed jeans with 5 visible torn or frayed areas, tan wooden platform mule heels, and a tan leather bucket bag with long fringe hanging from one arm. Accessories include 1 large gold medallion pendant necklace, multiple stacked bracelets, and rings. The setting is an upscale neutral-toned patio with a stone tile floor, wicker outdoor seating in the foreground, a dark blue sideboard cabinet in the back, a wall-mounted flat-screen TV on the left, 2 lantern decor pieces on the cabinet, potted greenery, cream stucco columns, and lush green hedges visible outside. Natural daylight, soft editorial lighting, realistic photography, vertical composition, sharp focus on outfit details, luxury lifestyle fashion shoot, relaxed but polished styling.
